expressions.english: to ask
to ask for directions; to ask the way (to get somewhere)
to ask the reason
to ask one's opinion
to ask a friend
Let me ask you something.
expressions.notes:
뭐 = what; something
뭐 is the contracted form of 무엇.

expressions.english: Ask me anytime.
Answer to only what you are asked.
expressions.notes:
말 = language; what one says; expression; word, term
-만 = only; just
대답하다 = to answer

expressions.english: Can you ask how much the price is?
expressions.notes:
가격 = price
얼마 = how much
-(으)ㄹ래요? = Do you want to + V?; Shall we + V?

expressions.english: Are you asking my opinion now?
Please stop asking. I don't know either.
expressions.notes:
그만 -(으)세요. = Stop + V-ing.; Quit + V-ing.
-도 = too, also
모르다 = to not know

expressions.english: If you have something you don't know about, ask me.
I lost my way, so I asked a person passing by.

expressions.korean: 제가 묻지도 않았는데 그 사람이 말해 줬어요.
expressions.english: I didn't even ask, but he told me (anyway).
expressions.notes:
-지도 않다 = to not even + V
말하다 = to talk; to say; to speak; to tell

expressions.korean: 저도 잘 모르는데 친구한테 한 번 물어 볼게요.
expressions.english: I don't know (about that very) well, but I will ask my friend.

expressions.korean: 공부하다가 모르는 게 있으면 바로 물 어보세요.
expressions.english: If you come across something you don't know while studying, ask (about it) right away.
expressions.notes:
공부하다 = to study
-다가 = as a result of V-ing
바로 = right away; straight; exactly; close(ly); right

expressions.korean: 저한테 묻지 말고 그 사람한테 직접 물 어보세요.
expressions.english: Don't ask me, but ask him directly.
expressions.notes: 직접 = directly; by oneself; with one's own hands

expressions.korean: 물어보는 것이 자존심 상해요, 그냥 제 가 알아볼게요.
expressions.english: If I ask, it'll hurt my pride. I'll just look into it myself.
expressions.notes:
자존심 = self-esteem; one's pride
상하다 = to hurt; to go bad
그냥 = just, only, simply
알아보다 = to investigate; to check up on; to find out; to search; to look into

expressions.korean: 제가 물어봤는데 그 사람이 제대로 대 답을 안 해 줬어요.
expressions.english: I asked, but he didn't give me a proper answer.
expressions.notes:
제대로 = properly
대답을 하다 = to answer
안 = not

expressions.korean: 어제 물어볼 게 있어서 전화했는데 전 화를 안 받으시더라고요.
expressions.english: I called you yesterday because I had something to ask, but you didn't answer the phone.
expressions.notes:
전화하다 = to call, make a phone call
전화 = phone call; telephone
전화를 받다 = to receive a phone call, pick up/ answer the phone
